subject: Fix vulnerability issue: upgrade org.apache.tomcat.embed.tomcat-embed-core to 8.5.42
commit_message:
Fix vulnerability issue: upgrade org.apache.tomcat.embed.tomcat-embed-core to 8.5.42

And update to the released version of pomba-audit-common

Issue-ID: LOG-1066
Issue-ID: LOG-1099
Signed-off-by: Prudence Au <prudence.au@amdocs.com>
Change-Id: Ifa9b0dc8d58f144a83acca4f98964476159345c9

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/logging-analytics-pomba-pomba-network-discovery-context-builder-master-verify-java/101/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.logging-analytics.pomba:pomba-audit-common:jar:1.5.0 needed for sub-project org.onap.logging-analytics.pomba:pomba-network-discovery-context-builder:jar:1.5.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/logging-analytics-pomba-pomba-network-discovery-context-builder-master-verify-java/101/ )
